evals.prompt: I have a DSPy ChainOfThought program for classifying support tickets. I have about 80 labeled examples. Help me optimize it with BootstrapFewShot.
evals.expected_output: Code using dspy.BootstrapFewShot with metric, compile, and evaluation comparing baseline vs optimized scores

assertions.name: metric_signature
assertions.description: Defines a metric function with (example, prediction, trace=None) signature

assertions.name: with_inputs_on_examples
assertions.description: Training examples use .with_inputs() to mark input fields

assertions.name: baseline_before_optimization
assertions.description: Evaluates baseline BEFORE optimization to establish comparison

assertions.name: held_out_devset
assertions.description: Uses a held-out devset separate from trainset for evaluation

evals.prompt: I optimized my DSPy program with BootstrapFewShot but accuracy dropped. Only about 5% of my training examples pass the metric. What should I do?
evals.expected_output: Diagnosis of low metric pass rate causing insufficient bootstrapped demos, with actionable fixes

assertions.name: identifies_low_pass_rate
assertions.description: Identifies the core issue: too few passing traces means too few bootstrapped demos

assertions.name: suggests_relaxing_metric
assertions.description: Suggests relaxing the metric (e.g., containment instead of exact match, or partial credit)

assertions.name: suggests_data_quality_fix
assertions.description: Suggests checking data quality and fixing labels

assertions.name: suggests_teacher_model
assertions.description: Suggests trying a stronger teacher model via teacher_settings

assertions.name: no_premature_jump_to_finetuning
assertions.description: Does NOT suggest jumping to fine-tuning or heavier optimizers as the first fix

evals.prompt: I want to optimize a multi-step DSPy pipeline that first generates a search query then answers a question. I have 60 examples. Should I use BootstrapFewShot or MIPROv2?
evals.expected_output: Recommends BootstrapFewShot as the first step given ~60 examples, with upgrade path to MIPROv2

assertions.name: recommends_bootstrap_first
assertions.description: Recommends BootstrapFewShot as the starting point for ~60 examples

assertions.name: explains_all_predictors_optimized
assertions.description: Explains that BootstrapFewShot optimizes all predictors in the pipeline

assertions.name: mentions_miprov2_upgrade
assertions.description: Mentions MIPROv2 as an upgrade if accuracy plateaus (typically needs 200+ examples)

assertions.name: per_predictor_demos
assertions.description: Shows that each predictor (query generation and answer) gets its own demos

assertions.name: includes_baseline_comparison
assertions.description: Includes evaluation code with baseline comparison
